ddls:
CREATE TABLE "competitions" (
  "competition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each competition */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the competition */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the competition */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the competition */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the competition */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the competition was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the competition was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the competition is currently active */,
  "registration_start" TEXT /* Date when registration for the competition opens */,
  "registration_end" TEXT /* Date when registration for the competition closes */,
  "prize_pool" REAL /* Total prize pool for the competition */,
  "organizer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who organized the competition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("competition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "problems" (
  "problem_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each problem */,
  "competition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the competition the problem belongs to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the problem */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the problem */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the problem was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the problem was last updated */,
  "difficulty" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the problem */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points assigned to the problem */,
  "is_visible" INTEGER /* Indicates if the problem is visible to participants */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("problem_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_problems_competition_id FOREIGN KEY ("competition_id") REFERENCES competitions ("competition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "submissions" (
  "submission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each submission */,
  "problem_id" INTEGER /* ID of the problem the submission belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the submission */,
  "submission_type" TEXT /* Type of submission (e.g., examples, full solution) */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date the submission was made */,
  "score" REAL /* Score assigned to the submission */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the submission (e.g., pending, accepted, rejected) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the submission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the submission was last updated */,
  "language" TEXT /* Programming language used for the submission */,
  "is_latest" INTEGER /* Indicates if this is the latest submission for the problem by the user */,
  "test_case_results" TEXT /* Results of the test cases */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("submission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_submissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_submissions_problem_id FOREIGN KEY ("problem_id") REFERENCES problems ("problem_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, reviewer, user) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "bio" TEXT /* User's bio or description */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "submission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the submission being reviewed */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reviewer */,
  "score" REAL /* Score assigned by the reviewer */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the reviewer */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was made */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the review was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the review was last updated */,
  "is_latest" INTEGER /* Indicates if this is the latest review for the submission */,
  "review_type" TEXT /* Type of review (e.g., initial, final) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_submission_id FOREIGN KEY ("submission_id") REFERENCES submissions ("submission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user being rated */,
  "rating" REAL /* Current rating of the user */,
  "change" REAL /* Change in rating */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the rating was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the rating was last updated */,
  "rating_type" TEXT /* Type of rating (e.g., provisional, final) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "competition_participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "competition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the competition the user is participating in */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user's participation (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the participation was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the participation was last updated */,
  "is_confirmed" INTEGER /* Indicates if the participation is confirmed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_competition_participants_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_competition_participants_competition_id FOREIGN KEY ("competition_id") REFERENCES competitions ("competition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "problem_submissions" (
  "problem_submission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each problem submission */,
  "problem_id" INTEGER /* ID of the problem */,
  "submission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the submission */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the submission (e.g., pending, accepted, rejected) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the problem submission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the problem submission was last updated */,
  "is_latest" INTEGER /* Indicates if this is the latest submission for the problem */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("problem_submission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_problem_submissions_problem_id FOREIGN KEY ("problem_id") REFERENCES problems ("problem_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_problem_submissions_submission_id FOREIGN KEY ("submission_id") REFERENCES submissions ("submission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "submission_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file */,
  "submission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the submission the file belongs to */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the file in MB */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the file was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the file was last updated */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., .py, .java) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_submission_files_submission_id FOREIGN KEY ("submission_id") REFERENCES submissions ("submission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review the comment belongs to */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was last updated */,
  "is_latest" INTEGER /* Indicates if this is the latest comment for the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_comments_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rating_changes" (
  "change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating change */,
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* ID of the rating being changed */,
  "new_rating" REAL /* New rating */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was changed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the rating change was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the rating change was last updated */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the rating change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rating_changes_rating_id FOREIGN KEY ("rating_id") REFERENCES ratings ("rating_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "competition_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "competition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the competition */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "place" INTEGER /* Place of the user in the competition */,
  "score" REAL /* Score of the user in the competition */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the result was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the result was last updated */,
  "is_final" INTEGER /* Indicates if this is the final result for the competition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_competition_results_competition_id FOREIGN KEY ("competition_id") REFERENCES competitions ("competition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_competition_results_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
